description: Wind Power LLC has expanded operations to Europe and maintains a Euro-denominated bank account ('EUR Bank - WP'). At the end of the financial month, the Euro has strengthened against the US Dollar. You need to run the Exchange Rate Revaluation process in ERPNext to calculate and recognize the unrealized foreign exchange gain. The 'EUR Bank - WP' account has a balance of €10,000 originally recorded at 1.05 USD/EUR. Navigate to the Exchange Rate Revaluation list, create a new document for Wind Power LLC, fetch or add the row for 'EUR Bank - WP', and set the New Exchange Rate to 1.15. Save and submit the document. Finally, generate the corresponding Journal Entry from the submitted revaluation, review it to ensure it posts the $1,000 gain correctly, and save and submit the Journal Entry. Log into ERPNext at http://localhost:8080 with credentials Administrator / admin.
